## Contract-surface review

- [ ] Contract-surface review: not applicable.
- [ ] Contract-surface review: required — the summary explains the signing,
      wire-shape, escalation, directive, outbox, capability-token, or CI
      authority changed and the focused review performed.

## Public PR Hygiene

- [ ] Title and summary describe the shipped behavior, not private execution notes.
- [ ] No agent session URLs, private host/org paths, absolute personal paths, or tool transcript excerpts.
- [ ] No roadmap codenames or launch/ops shorthand unless already public and relevant to this diff.
- [ ] Commit messages are public-ready: no session URLs, private paths, local-only process notes, or assistant attribution footers.
